claims.text: Manual follow-up breaks at a specific lead-volume/timing point rather than degrading gradually
An automated system fires the first response in under five minutes
The platform offers a 14-day free trial with no card needed

disclosure: Response-time and close-rate statistics are drawn from widely cited third-party lead-response research, not Black Arrow's own client data. Figures are presented as industry benchmarks, not company-verified results.

claims.text: Industry research suggests only about 17% of service businesses respond to a new lead within an hour.
Responding within five minutes can double the odds of closing a lead, per third-party lead-response research.
Most owners believe they sit at Level 2, but many actually sit at Level 1.

disclosure: Sourced from Search Engine Journal and Search Engine Roundtable coverage of Google's July 2026 announcement

claims.text: Google is moving Local Services Ads into Google Ads as Performance Max pay-per-lead campaigns beginning August 2026, with other accounts following through 2027
Google will calculate one campaign-level Target CPA covering multiple service categories after migration, unless advertisers create separate campaigns
Business name, address, and hours sync from Google Business Profile into the new Google Ads setup, and significant changes trigger a 24-48 hour verification review that can pause the campaign
Owners should pull 90 days of cost-per-lead, close rate, and job value data by service category before the migration reaches their account
